body:
hoodiegal:

lady-viccy:

voidcatdoll:

angelicsister-deactivated202602:

omg of course the harassment squad doesn’t support diy hrt either. anything to keep trans girls miserable eh?

“doctors will take your starting levels, body weight and metabolism into account” no they won’t, they’ll slap the standard misery dose of 2mg pills a day on a script and call it a day. Take the fucking DIY

i have never, in any country, heard of any trans woman get started on anything other than or under the minimum recommended dosage

and once you do bloodwork, they have two responses: “that’s a bit high” and “that seems like a good level”. never “we need to get your levels up a bit”.

seriously, when i tested a new method of delivery and it worked so badly i could physically feel that my levels were busted, i tested at 90 pmol/L. Common recommended range is 700-900 pmol/L. My endo’s reaction to this wasn’t “well this obviously isn’t working, lets get you on something else”. It was “do you want to try this for a bit longer?”. NO. I wanted to stop sooner but you insisted I keep using it until we did this bloodwork that has clearly shown that IT DOES NOT WORK.

I was still denied injections.

So, I started with DIY off and on for years, and then when I started going through doctors, I admitted this and they started me on injections with my previous dosage and adjusted from there, just in case this might work for anyone else…🖤
